title: Manage Saved Queries
overview: Click Save Query to store your SOQL for reuse. Later, use Select Query to pick a saved query (most-recent first); DSP parses it into the visual SOQL Builder so you can review, refine, and run it again. In Saved Queries, you can relabel, update, delete, or download entries anytime.
generalUseCase: Use the Query component to build and manage your frequently used SOQL queries—so you can quickly reuse, refine, and rerun them.
